df['cap_surface'] = df['cap_surface'].astype(str).str.strip().str.replace(r'\s+', '', regex=True)
df['veil_color'] = df['veil_color'].astype(str).str.strip().str.replace(r'\s+', '', regex=True)


unique_rows = df.drop_duplicates(subset='all', keep='first')

merged_df = pd.merge(unique_rows, df, on='all', how='outer').loc[lambda x: x['all'].isin(x.index)].drop('all', axis=1)
df = merged_df

response_preview:
{"type": "transform", "code": "def clean duplicates():
    non_duplicate_rows = []
    seen = set()
    for i, row in df.iterrows():
        key = tuple(row.dropna().values)
        if key not in seen:
            non_duplicate_rows.append(row)
            seen.add(key)
    return pd.DataFrame(non_duplicate_rows)}
